name: Sigma Lens 19mm F/2.8 DN AF for Sony
description: A comfortable wide-angle field of view along with a compact design, the silverSigma 19mm f2.8 DN Artis a sleek and portable prime lens designed for Sony E mirrorless cameras

features.Key Features :: E-Mount Lens/APS-C Format | 28.5mm (35mm Equivalent) | Aperture Range: f/2.8 to f/22 | Three Aspherical Elements | Super Multi-Layer Coating | Linear AF Motor | Rounded 7-Blade Diaphragm | Sigma 19mm f2.8 DN Art Lens for Sony E (Silver) | Sigma LCF-46 III 46mm Lens Cap | Sigma Rear Cap LCR II for Sony E Mount Lenses | Sigma Lens Hood for 30mm f2.8 EX DN Art Lens | Lens Case
